"'''The Starhoppers of Aduba-3'''" was an article published in [[Star Wars Gamer 4|''Star Wars Gamer'' 4]] which provided information for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. It was written by authors [[Pablo Hidalgo]], [[Cory J. Herndon]] and [[Michael Mikaelian]], and retold events established in the [[Marvel Comics]] issues [[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]], [[Star Wars (1977) 9|''Star Wars'' (1977) 9]], and [[Star Wars (1977) 10|''Star Wars'' (1977) 10]].

{{Game-stub}}
